detail: Explicit image and PSF grids with matching micrometer spacing accepted.

Richardson-Lucy TV validation cannot combine Image and PSF: their physical grids are incompatible (axis 0 (y) sample spacing differs (0.1 micrometer per sample versus 0.075 micrometer per sample); axis 1 (x) sample spacing differs (0.1 micrometer per sample versus 0.075 micrometer per sample)). Supply a PSF measured or explicitly resampled at the image's spatial sampling; VIPP does not resample PSFs implicitly.
PSF dimensionality (3D) must match the resolved spatial dimensionality (2D).
Explicit image and PSF grids with matching micrometer spacing accepted.

Richardson-Lucy TV validation cannot combine Image and PSF: their physical grids are incompatible (axis 0 (z) sample spacing differs (0.3 micrometer per sample versus 0.225 micrometer per sample); axis 1 (y) sample spacing differs (0.1 micrometer per sample versus 0.075 micrometer per sample); axis 2 (x) sample spacing differs (0.1 micrometer per sample versus 0.075 micrometer per sample)). Supply a PSF measured or explicitly resampled at the image's spatial sampling; VIPP does not resample PSFs implicitly.
PSF dimensionality (4D) must match the resolved spatial dimensionality (3D).
